response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. Only brief C++ exposure (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no demonstrated Windows platform C++ development at scale, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. Recent work is centered on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/AI tooling — a poor match for a mid-senior C++ capital markets engagement.
strengths: Solid 10+ years of professional software engineering across multiple stacks
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Excellent written and verbal communication, including public talks and workshops
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 years required
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
